evidence: historical data shows that SOL tends to continue its downward trend when below the 20-day EMA.
raw_rule: IF (SOL price < 20-day EMA) AND (direction == 'SHORT') THEN increase_position_size BECAUSE historical data shows that SOL tends to continue its downward trend when below the 20-day EMA.

evidence: this could indicate a potential mean reversion, and reducing position size can help mitigate losses.
raw_rule: IF (number of consecutive winning trades > 3) THEN reduce_position_size BECAUSE this could indicate a potential mean reversion, and reducing position size can help mitigate losses.

evidence: high volatility may indicate increased uncertainty, and hedging can help reduce potential losses.
raw_rule: IF (SOL volatility > 2*average_volatility) THEN hedge_position BECAUSE high volatility may indicate increased uncertainty, and hedging can help reduce potential losses.
